_doc: Search Profile phase output returned by runSearchProfile() and its inner buildSearchProfile().

buildSearchProfile_return.variant_guard_terms: array — tokens used by identity guard in Query Journey
buildSearchProfile_return.identity_aliases: array of { alias: string, source: string, weight: number }
buildSearchProfile_return.base_templates: array of string — prior queries to avoid (fed to Search Planner as query history)
buildSearchProfile_return.query_rows: array of row objects — tier-tagged deterministic query rows
buildSearchProfile_return.queries: array of string — bounded query strings
buildSearchProfile_return.targeted_queries: array of string — queries from query_rows

_common.hint_source: string — tier1_seed | tier2_group | tier3_key | archetype_* | field_rule_* | ...
_common.tier: string — seed | group_search | key_search (only present on tier-dispatched rows)

downstream_consumers: Search Planner phase — receives searchProfileBase.query_rows and searchProfileBase.base_templates
Query Journey phase — receives searchProfileBase (variant_guard_terms, query_reject_log)
persistence: Search Profile generation is in-memory only. The persisted artifact is written later by Query Journey.
